evidence.observation: Fixture soil survey screening: very poorly drained hydric soils — Brunswick County wetlands/soils stress case. Dominant map unit indicates consistently saturated conditions with high septic limitation.

observed_value.source_note: SSURGO-class fixture data for Brunswick County wetlands/soils stress case.

evidence.caveat: Fixture-only soil survey screening for Brunswick County wetlands/soils area. SSURGO soil survey data is a broad screening tool; it is not a site-specific soil evaluation or on-site septic determination. Very poorly drained hydric soils indicate high water table and likely constraints on conventional septic systems. Requires evaluation by a licensed soil scientist and county environmental health approval.
